2245500.name: Abstract Winter
2245500.description:
Are you ready for an exciting advanture that will encourage you to beat your own record every time and overcome dangerous obstacles with your snowboard?
Grab your snowboard and try to overcome the dangerous journey with acrobatic moves!

>Face different obstacles and overcome them using various acrobatic moves!
>Experience endless gameplay where you can improve your gameplay and beat your own record with every try!
>Increase your game experience with multiple character costumes that you can choose according to your own pleasure!
